zh.lifeSummary: 當William Wadham於1386年出生在英國戴文素斯 哈姆斯時，他的父親Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield42歲，母親Joan de Wrottesley36歲。他於1401年與Margaret Chiselden在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1442年被列為high sheriff of devon。他去世於1452年10月5日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特易爾明斯特享年66歲，埋葬在英國戴文金斯布利其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Wadham于1386年出生在英国戴文素斯 哈姆斯时，他的父亲Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield42岁，母亲Joan de Wrottesley36岁。他于1401年与Margaret Chiselden在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1442年被列为high sheriff of devon。他去世于1452年10月5日在英国英格兰薩默塞特易爾明斯特享年66岁，埋葬在英国戴文金斯布利其。

nameMeanings.name: Wadham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon).

variants.name: Waddams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Wadhams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Wada or Old English wād ‘woad’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’. Wadham College, Oxford, was founded in 1610 by Dorothy Wadham, widow of Nicholas Wadham (died 1609), a wealthy Somerset landowner.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Wadham was born in 1386, in South Hams, Devon, England, his father, Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield, was 42 and his mother, Joan de Wrottesley, was 36. He married Margaret Chiselden in 1401, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. In 1442, at the age of 56, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of devon. He died on 5 October 1452, in Ilminster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Kingsbridge, Devon, England.

fr.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Wadham est né en 1386, à South Hams, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Joan de Wrottesley, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Chiselden en 1401, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. En 1442, à l’âge de 56 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of devon. Il est décédé le 5 octobre 1452, à Ilminster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Kingsbridge, Devon, Angleterre.

de.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, England
de.lifeSummary: Als William Wadham 1386 in South Hams, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield 42 und seine Mutter Joan de Wrottesley 36. Er hat 1401 in Devon, England, United Kingdom Margaret Chiselden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1442, als er 56 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff of devon aufgeführt. Er starb am 5. Oktober 1452 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Ilminster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kingsbridge, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Wadham è nato il nel 1386 nel South Hams, Devon, England, il suo padre, Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Wrottesley, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Chiselden nel 1401, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1442, all'età di 56 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of devon. Morì il 5 ottobre 1452, nel Ilminster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Kingsbridge, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Wadhamが1386年にイギリスデボンソウス ハムズで生まれた時，父Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifieldは42歳，母Joan de Wrottesleyは36歳であった。1401年にイギリスイギリスデボンでMargaret Chiseldenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1442年，56歳の時，職業はhigh sheriff of devonと記録されている。彼は1452年10月5日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトイルミンスターで66歳で死去し，イギリスデボンキングスブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: 영국 데폰 노우스톤 스트 피터'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: William Wadham(이)가 1386년 영국 데폰 소우스 함스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Wrottesley(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1401년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Margaret Chiselden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1442년, 56세의 나이로 그의 직업은 high sheriff of devon이었다. 그는 1452년 10월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 이민스터에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 킨그스브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Wadham nasceu em 1386, em South Hams, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Wrottesley, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Chiselden em 1401, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1442, com 56 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of devon. Ele faleceu em 5 de outubro de 1452, em Ilminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Kingsbridge, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: ст питир'с чурч, ноустоун, девон, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Wadham родился в 1386 г. в местности соут хамс, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Wrottesley, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Chiselden в 1401 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. В 1442 году, в возрасте 56 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff of devon. Он умер 5 октября 1452 г. в местности илминстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности кингсбридж, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Wadham nació en 1386, en South Hams, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Joan de Wrottesley, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Margaret Chiselden en 1401, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1442, a la edad de 56 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of devon. Murió el 5 de octubre de 1452, en Ilminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Kingsbridge, Devon, Inglaterra.
